name: Brussels Sprouts and Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (1 can) canned carrots, sliced and cooked;
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook brussels sprouts according to package directions until they are crisp but tender. Drain.
2. In a bowl, add drained carrots and cooked brussels sprouts. Add Lemon Shaker Dressing and mix well.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 4-6 hours before using. Stir occasionally.
Food Exchange per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES; CAL: 49; CHO: 11g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 273mg. For low-sodium diets, omit salt when cooking brussels sprouts and from the Lemon Shaker Dressing.
